{{Short description|none}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Bahamas women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name               = The Bahamas
| Nickname           = ''The Baha Boyz''
| Badge              = Bahamas FA.png
| Badge_size         = 225px
| Association        = [[Bahamas Football Association]] (BFA)
| Confederation      = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation  = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach              = [[Kevin Davies (Bahamian footballer)|Kevin Davies]]
| Captain            = [[Marcel Joseph]]
| Most caps          = [[Lesly St. Fleur]] (45)
| Top scorer         = [[Lesly St. Fleur]] (14)
| Home Stadium       = [[Thomas Robinson Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme     = BAH
| FIFA Rank          = {{FIFA World Rankings|BAH}}
| FIFA max           = 138
| FIFA max date      = September 2006
| FIFA min           = 210
| FIFA min date      = September 2018 – July 2019
| Elo Rank           = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Bahamas}}
| Elo max            = 191
| Elo max date       = October 2011
| Elo min            = 207
| Elo min date       = 2001, 2004
| pattern_la1        = 
| pattern_b1         = _bah21h
| pattern_ra1        = 
| pattern_sh1        = _bah21h
| pattern_so1        = _gimnastic1617h
| leftarm1           = FFCC00
| body1              = FFCC00
| rightarm1          = FFCC00
| shorts1            = 000000
| socks1             = 000000
| pattern_la2        = 
| pattern_b2         = _bah21a
| pattern_ra2        = 
| pattern_sh2        = _bah21h2
| pattern_so2        = _gimnastic1617h
| leftarm2           = 00879E
| body2              = 00879E
| rightarm2          = 00879E
| shorts2            = 000000
| socks2             = 000000
| pattern_la3        = 
| pattern_b3         = _bah21t
| pattern_ra3        = 
| pattern_sh3        = _bah21h
| pattern_so3        = _gimnastic1617h
| leftarm3           = FFFFFF
| body3              = FFFFFF
| rightarm3          = FFFFFF
| shorts3            = 000000
| socks3             = 000000
| First game         = {{fb|JAM}} 8–1 {{fb-rt|BAH|colonial}}<br>([[Kingston, Jamaica|Kingston]], Jamaica; 17 July 1965)
| Largest win        = {{fb|BAH}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|TCA}}<br>([[Nassau, Bahamas|Nassau]], Bahamas; 9 July 2011)
| Largest loss       = {{fb|MEX}} 13–0 {{fb-rt|BAH|1973}}<br>([[Toluca]], Mexico; 28 April 1987)
| World cup apps     = 
| World cup first    = 
| World cup best     = 
| Regional name      = 
| Regional cup apps  = 
| Regional cup first = 
| Regional cup best  = 
}}

The '''Bahamas national football team''' represents [[The Bahamas]] in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Bahamas Football Association]] founded in 1967. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] since 1968 and a member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1981. Regionally, it is a member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

The Bahamas has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] and the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]], but has participated twice in League B and twice in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]].

The Bahamas' debut in international competitions was in the [[Football at the 1970 Central American and Caribbean Games|1970 Central American and Caribbean Games]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team achieved its first victory in 1971, defeating [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] 4–2.

==History==
On 17 July 1965, The Bahamas played their first international match, in a friendly against [[Jamaica national football team|Jamaica]], losing 8–1 in [[Kingston, Jamaica|Kingston]].
The team played their first official international matches in the [[Football at the 1970 Central American and Caribbean Games|1970 Central American and Caribbean Games]], losing their debut 3–0 against [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]], an 8–1 loss against [[Netherlands Antilles national football team|Netherlands Antilles]] and 5–0 to [[Venezuela national football team|Venezuela]]. They did manage to get their first draw though, a 2–2 result against [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]].<ref>{{cite web |last1=Courtney |first1=Barrie |title=Central American and Caribbean Games 1970 (Panama) |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesc/cag70.html |website=RSSSF |access-date=2 February 2023 |archive-date=25 December 2022 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20221225131721/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesc/cag70.html |url-status=live }}</ref> The following year, Bahamas participated in the [[Football at the 1971 Pan American Games|1971 Pan American Games]], achieving their first victory over [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] 4–2, but failing to exit the group stages. They returned to play in the [[Football at the 1974 Central American and Caribbean Games|1974 Central American and Caribbean Games]], and managed a historic 1–0 victory against [[Panama national football team|Panama]], but lost 3–0 to [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]] and 2–0 to the [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] and was eliminated again in the first round.

Bahamas finished bottom of their group in the [[Football at the 1982 Central American and Caribbean Games|1982 Central American and Caribbean Games]] and in the [[Football at the 1986 Central American and Caribbean Games|1986 edition]], they were given a bye into the quarterfinals due to a withdrawal, however Bahamas were beaten by [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]] and eliminated. They also participated in the qualifying rounds for the [[1984 CONCACAF Pre-Olympic Tournament qualification|1984 Olympic Games]] (eliminated by an amateur [[Mexico national football team|Mexico]] team) and the [[1988 CONCACAF Pre-Olympic Tournament qualification|1988 Olympics]] (beaten by [[Guyana national football team|Guyana]]). On 28 April 1987, the Bahamas experienced their worst defeat at the hands of the Mexican team, who crushed them 13–0 as part of the qualifying tournament for the [[Football at the 1987 Pan American Games|1987 Pan American Games]].

In the 1990s, the Bahamas withdrew from [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 World Cup qualifying]], leaving [[Saint Kitts and Nevis national football team|Saint Kitts and Nevis]] to advance to the next round. Bahamas advanced past the preliminary round [[1999 Caribbean Cup]], but failed to beat [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]] (0–6), [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]] (0–7) and the [[Cayman Islands national football team|Cayman Islands]] (1–4) and finished last in their group.

The 2000s saw the ''Baha Boyz'' enter three consecutive World Cup qualifiers; [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002]], [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2006]] and [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2010]] being eliminated by [[Haiti national football team|Haiti]] (aggregate score 13–0), [[Dominica national football team|Dominica]] (aggregate score 4–2) and [[Jamaica national football team|Jamaica]] (aggregate score 13–0), respectively. In the [[2007 Caribbean Cup]] they got through the first knockout round but finished in last position in the second qualifying round behind [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]], [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent]] and [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]].

In the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2014 World Cup qualifiers]], the Bahamas thrashed the [[Turks and Caicos Islands national football team|Turks and Caicos Islands]] with an aggregate score of 10–0, advancing to the second phase however, the team withdrew from the competition as the renovations for the [[Thomas Robinson Stadium]] were not completed and playing the fixtures at neutral venues would have been financially prohibitive.<ref>{{cite web |title=Bahamas pull out of World Cup qualifiers |url=https://www.reuters.com/article/us-soccer-world-bahamas-idUSTRE77L27X20110822 |website=Reuters |date=22 August 2011 |access-date=3 February 2022 |archive-date=3 February 2022 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220203101203/https://www.reuters.com/article/us-soccer-world-bahamas-idUSTRE77L27X20110822 |url-status=live }}</ref> In the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2018 World Cup qualifying]], they faced [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]] in the first round, losing 8–0 on aggregate. In the first round of [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2022 World Cup qualification]], Bahamas failed to score a goal, finishing in last place, having conceded 15.

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Bahamas national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group B|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GRN}}
|score      = 6–0
|team2      = {{fb|BAH}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017726
|goals1     =
*[[Jermaine Francis|Francis]] {{goal|15}}
*[[Darius Johnson (footballer)|Johnson]] {{goal|36}}
*[[Keishean Francois|Francois]] {{goal|58}}
*[[Joshua Isaac|Isaac]] {{goal|72}}
*[[Kayden Harrack|Harrack]] {{goal|77}}
*[[Saydrel Lewis|Lewis]] {{goal|90}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[St. George's, Grenada|St. George's]], Grenada
|stadium    = [[Kirani James Athletic Stadium]]
|attendance = 2,235
|referee    = Shavin Greene ([[Guyana Football Federation|Guyana]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group B|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 7 June
| time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-4}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
| score      = 0–8
| team2      = {{fb|CRC}}
| report     = https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2025/06/07/nc-america/wc-qualifying-concacaf/bahamas/costa-rica/4313881/
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
*[[Alonso Martínez (footballer)|Martínez]] {{goal|20}}
*[[Joseph Mora|Mora]] {{goal|37}}
*[[Alejandro Bran|Bran]] {{goal|45+2}}
*[[Orlando Galo|Galo]] {{goal|48}}
*[[Manfred Ugalde|Ugalde]] {{goal|51}}
*[[Warren Madrigal|Madrigal]] {{goal|64||79}}
*[[Álvaro Zamora|Zamora]] {{goal|90}}
| location   = [[Wildey, Barbados|Wildey]], Barbados
| stadium    = [[BFA Technical Centre]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = Reon Radix ([[Grenada Football Association|Grenada]])
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 1–2
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/concacaf-series/news/bellechasse-oughterson-score-braces-to-open-concacaf-series/
|goals1     =
*[[William Bayles (footballer)|Bayles]] {{Goal|52|pen.}}
|goals2     =
*[[Mekhi Connor|Connor]] {{goal|11}}
*[[Tarique Jackson|Jackson]] {{goal|87}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Micah Erskine ([[Guyana Football Federation|Guyana]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 0–6
|team2      = {{fb|BVI}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2025-11-15/bahamas-vs-british-virgin-islands/3936746
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
*[[Javaun Splatt|Splatt]] {{Goal|5||41||52}}
*[[Kyran Samadi|Samadi]] {{Goal|44}}
*[[Kristian Javier|Javier]] {{Goal|50}}
*[[Luka Chalwell|Chalwell]] {{Goal|72}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Shavin Greene ([[Guyana Football Federation|Guyana]])
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 1–3
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-26/bahamas-vs-anguilla/4095365
|goals1     =
*[[Robert Holcombe (footballer)|Holcombe]] {{goal|15}}
|goals2     =
*[[Jan-Willem Tesselaar|Tesselaar]] {{goal|43||52|pen.}}
*[[Jonathan Guishard|Guishard]] {{goal|83}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Renlee Napoleon]] ([[Saint Lucia Football Association|Saint Lucia]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–0
|team2      = {{fb|BAH}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-30/cayman-islands-vs-bahamas/4095373
|goals1     = [[Junior Kelly (footballer)|Kelly]] {{goal|59|o.g.}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Tristley Bassue ([[St. Kitts and Nevis Football Association|St. Kitts and Nevis]])
|result     = L
}}

==Coaching history==
{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Randy Rogers (football manager)|Randy Rogers]] (1987-1998)
*{{flagicon|England}} [[Peter Wilson (football manager)|Peter Wilson]] (1998–1999)
*{{flagicon|England}} [[Gary White (footballer)|Gary White]] (1999–2006)
*{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Neider dos Santos]] (2006–2010)
*{{flagicon|Guyana}} Paul James (2011)
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Kevin Davies (Bahamian footballer)|Kevin Davies]] (2011–2014)
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Nesley Jean]] (2014)
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Dion Godet]] (2014–2018)
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Nesley Jean]] (2019–2024)
*{{flagicon|Bahamas}} [[Kevin Davies (Bahamian footballer)|Kevin Davies]] (2025-present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series|2026 CONCACAF Series]] matches against [[Anguilla national football team|Anguilla]] and [[Cayman Islands national football team|Cayman Islands]] on 26 and 29 March 2026.<ref>{{Cite Instagram|user=bahamasfootball|postid=DWRz5O9kW3J|title= Squad Announcement 🇧🇸|date=March 24, 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 30 March 2026, after the match against [[Cayman Islands national football team|Cayman Islands]]''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Michael Butler (footballer, born 1999|Michael Butler]]|age={{bda|1999|3|2|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Inter Nassau]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Vance Wheaton]]|age={{bda|2005|4|4|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Miguel Thompson]]|age={{bda|2001|7|8|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Dynamos FC (The Bahamas)|Dynamos FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Junior Kelly (footbaler)|Junior Kelly]]|age={{bda|2005|8|17|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Lamond Cross]]|age={{bda|2005|2|19|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Future Stars FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Justin Minns]]|age={{bda|2002|5|26|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Prince Cooper]]|age={{bda|2007|4|3|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Dynamos FC (The Bahamas)|Dynamos FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jamario Charles]]|age={{bda|2001|11|12|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes|UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Creven Ferguson]]|age={{bda|2003|4|13|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Chris Rahming]]|age={{bda|1999|4|27|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[FC Olimpia Satu Mare|Olimpia Satu Mare]]|clubnat=ROM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Re'john Ene]]|age={{bda|1996|6|27|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Dynamos FC (The Bahamas)|Dynamos FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dylan Archer|Dylan Archer]]|age={{bda|2008|11|22|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dwayne Taylor (footballer)|Dwyane Taylor]]|age={{bda|1998|7|31|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Dynamos FC (The Bahamas)|Dynamos FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Deron Ferguson]]|age={{bda|2006|9|11|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Western Warriors SC|Western Warriors]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Keno Thomas|Keno Thomas]]|age={{bda|2007|11|18|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes|UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Nahum Johnson]]||age={{bda|2006|7|10|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=1|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Lothario Milfrise]]||age={{bda|2003|3|14|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Douglas College|Douglas Royals]]|clubnat=CAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Joshua Johnson (Bahamian footballer)|Joshua Johnson]]|age={{bda|2003|3|19|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes|UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Robert Holcombe (footballer)|Robert Holcombe]]|age={{bda|2007|2|24|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[Baha Juniors FC|Baha Juniors]]|clubnat=BAH}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up for the team within the last 12 months and are still eligible to represent.

{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jonathan Miller (footballer)|Jonathan Miller]]|age={{bda|1998|6|11|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=0|club=[[Athletic Club Raleigh|AC Raleigh]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[William Gardiner (Bahamas footballer)|William Gardiner]]|age={{bda|2006|6|27|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Tampa Spartans]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jean Tilo]]|age={{bda|2002|11|15|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Daemen Wildcats]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jordan Cheetham]]|age={{bda|2007|2|20|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[South Carolina Gamecocks]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Lance Carroll]]|age={{bda|2009|1|21|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[Darlington School|Darlington Tigers]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jack Massey (footballer, born 2007)|Jack Massey]]|age={{bda|2007|9|10|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Omar Chemaly]]|age={{bda|2008|12|8|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Darlington School|Darlington Tigers]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Atarri Moss]]|age={{bda|2007|4|13|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Scarborough Football School]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[William Bayles (footballer)|William Bayles]]|age={{bda|2003|5|16|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=1|club=[[Graham Street Prims F.C.|Graham Street Prims]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{Nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Nicolás López (Bahamas footballer)|Nicolás López]]|age={{bda|2003|3|8|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Renegades FC]]|clubnat=BAH|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Reuben Edgecombe]]|age={{bda|2007|5|3|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[The Webb School (Bell Buckle, Tennessee)|Webb School]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Andre Roberts (footballer)|Andre Roberts]]|age={{bda|2000|3|18|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Western Warriors SC]] |clubnat=BAH|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kevin Thomas (Bahamian footballer)|Kevin Thomas]]|age={{bda|2005|12|27|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[UB Mingoes|UB Mingoes]]|clubnat=BAH|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Nathan Walker (Bahamian  footballer)|Nathan Walker]]||age={{bda|2009|1|17|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Western Warriors SC]]|clubnat=BAH|latest=v. {{fb|CRI}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{updated|25 May 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Bahamas |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/15/Bahamas.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Bahamas''.

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Lesly St. Fleur]]
|39
|13
|2006–2024
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Wood Julmis]]'''
|20
|6
|2021–present
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Chris Rahming]]'''
|18
|1
|2018–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Marcel Joseph]]'''
|18
|3
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=3|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Cameron Hepple]]
|17
|1
|2004–2021
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[William Bayles (footballer)|William Bayles]]'''
|17
|1
|2022–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Happy Hall]]
|17
|2
|2006–2021
|-
|rowspan=3|8
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Quinton Carey]]
|16
|2
|2019–2024
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jonathan Miller (footballer)|Jonathan Miller]]'''
|16
|0
|2018–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Dwayne Whylly]]
|16
|0
|2004–2019
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Lesly St. Fleur]]
|13
|39
|{{#expr:13/39 round 2}}
|2006–2024
|-
|rowspan=3|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Brandon Adderley]]'''
|6
|9
|{{#expr:6/9 round 2}}
|2022–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Nesley Jean]]
|6
|14
|{{#expr:6/14 round 2}}
|2004–2018
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Wood Julmis]]'''
|6
|20
|{{#expr:6/20 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Terry Delancy]]
|3
|13
|{{#expr:3/13 round 2}}
|2015–2021
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Marcel Joseph]]'''
|3
|18
|{{#expr:3/18 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=5|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kevin Davies (Bahamian footballer)|Kevin Davies]]
|2
|4
|{{#expr:2/4 round 2}}
|2000
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Anton Haven]]
|2
|4
|{{#expr:2/4 round 2}}
|2000
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Ryan Moseley (footballer)|Ryan Moseley]]
|2
|5
|{{#expr:2/5 round 2}}
|2006
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Quinton Carey]]'''
|2
|16
|{{#expr:2/16 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Happy Hall]]
|2
|17
|{{#expr:3/19 round 2}}
|2006–2021
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record 
!rowspan=15|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record 
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1966 FIFA World Cup|1966]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|[[1970 FIFA World Cup|1970]] to [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Declined participation''
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]||colspan=9 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|4||2||0||2||5||15
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|2||0||1||1||2||4
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|4||0||2||2||3||16
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew during the qualifiers''
|2||2||0||0||10||0
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]||colspan=9 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||0||2||0||8
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|4||0||1||3||0||15
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|4||0||0||4||1||22
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/7!!colspan=7|—
!22!!4!!4!!14!!21!!80
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1969 CONCACAF Championship|1969]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|[[1971 CONCACAF Championship|1971]] to [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]||colspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||colspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|-
|[[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]] to [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|CRC}} {{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]||colspan=9 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|-
|{{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
|{{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/6!!colspan=7|—
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019−20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|5th||4||3||1||0||10||2||{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group C|C]]
|12th||6||1||1||4||2||11||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|15th||5||0||1||4||7||21||{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|5th||4||1||1||2||10||13||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]||colspan=9|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!19!!5!!4!!10!!29!!47!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb-rt|BAH}} 2–1 {{fb|BON}}<br>(9 September 2019; [[Nassau, Bahamas|Nassau]], Bahamas)
|-
!Biggest Win
|{{fb-rt|BAH}} 4–0 {{fb|BVI}}<br>(10 October 2019; [[Basseterre]], Saint Kitts and Nevis)
|-
!Biggest Defeat
|{{fb|PUR}} 6–1 {{fb-rt|BAH}}<br>(9 September 2023; [[Nassau, Bahamas|Nassau]], The Bahamas)<br>{{fb|PUR}} 6–1 {{fb-rt|BAH}}<br>(21 November 2023; [[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], Puerto Rico)
|-
!Best Result
|12th – League B ([[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League#League B|2022–23]])
|-
!Worst Result
|Relegation League C ([[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League#League B|2023–24]])
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] / [[Caribbean Cup]] record
|rowspan=8|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{abbr|W|Won}}
!{{abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{abbr|GA|Goals against}}
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|[[1978 CFU Championship|1978]] to [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||5||1||1||3||4||17
|-
|[[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]] and [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||6||2||0||4||9||18
|-
|[[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]] to [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
!Total!!—!!0/2!!colspan=6|—
!11!!3!!1!!7!!13!!35
|}

===Pan American Games===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Football at the Pan American Games|Pan American Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[Football at the 1951 Pan American Games|1951]] to [[Football at the 1967 Pan American Games|1967]]||colspan=8|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|Colombia}} [[Football at the 1971 Pan American Games|1971]]||Preliminary round||—||3||1||0||2||4||13
|-
|[[Football at the 1975 Pan American Games|1975]] to [[Football at the 1979 Pan American Games|1979]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|Venezuela}} [[Football at the 1983 Pan American Games|1983]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
|[[Football at the 1987 Pan American Games|1987]] to [[Football at the 1995 Pan American Games|1995]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|Since [[Football at the 1999 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|1999]]||colspan=8|''The youth teams participated''
|-
!Total!!Preliminary round!!1/2!!3!!1!!0!!2!!4!!13
|}

===Central American and Caribbean Games===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Football at the Central American and Caribbean Games|Central American and Caribbean Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[Football at the 1930 Central American and Caribbean Games|1930]] to [[Football at the 1966 Central American and Caribbean Games|1966]]||colspan=8|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|PAN}} [[Football at the 1970 Central American and Caribbean Games|1970]]
|Group stage||8th||3||0||1||2||3||18
|- 
|[[Football at the 1970 Central American and Caribbean Games|1974]] and [[Football at the 1978 Central American and Caribbean Games|1978]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|Cuba}} [[Football at the 1982 Central American and Caribbean Games|1982]]||Group stage||8th||3||0||0||3||1||8
|-
|{{flagicon|Dominican Republic}} [[Football at the 1986 Central American and Caribbean Games|1986]]
|Quarter-finals||7th||2||0||0||2||1||7
|-
|Since [[Football at the 1990 Central American and Caribbean Games|1990]]||colspan=8|''The youth teams participated''
|-
!Total!!Quarter-finals!!3/3!!8!!0!!1!!7||5||33
|}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 15 November after match against [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Bahamas|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Bahamas|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=24 June 2017|archive-date=12 January 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180112052948/http://www.eloratings.net/Bahamas.htm|url-status=live}}</ref>

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #00778B}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #00778B}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #00778B}}
{| class="wikitable" style="font-size:100%; text-align: center;"
|-
|- style="color:black;"
!  style="width:145px; background:#FFC72C;"|Opponent
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| Pld
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| W
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| D
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| L
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| GF
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| GA
!  style="width:1px; background:#FFC72C;"| GD
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|AIA}} || 4 || 2 || 1 || 1 || 7 || 5 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ATG}} || 3 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 3 || 12 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BRB}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 5 || 11 || −6
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BLZ}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 4 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BER}} || 6 || 0 || 0 || 6 || 0 || 24 || −24
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BON}} || 2 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 2 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BVI}} || 5 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 10 || 9 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CAY}} || 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 4 || 9 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CRC}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 8 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CUB}} || 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 0 || 18 || −18
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CUW}}{{efn|Includes matches against the [[Netherlands Antilles national football team|Netherlands Antilles]].}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 8 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|DMA}} || 3 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 8 || −6
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|DOM}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 4 || 4 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GRN}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 6 || –6
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GLP}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUY}} || 5 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 3 || 17 || −14
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|HAI}} || 5 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 0 || 29 || −29
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|JAM}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 13 || −13
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MEX}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 16 || −16
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NCA}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 6 || −6
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|PAN}} || 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|PUR}} || 5 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 3 || 26 || −23
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SKN}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 0 || 9 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|VIN}} || 3 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 4 || 4 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TRI}} || 5 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 1 || 11 || –10
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TCA}} || 7 || 6 || 0 || 1 || 27 || 7 || +20
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|VIR}} || 3 || 1 || 2 || 0 || 3 || 4 || –1
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total || 83 || 16 || 11 || 56 || 82 || 234 || −152
|}
{{notelist}}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
* [http://www.bahamasfa.com/ Bahamas Football Association Website] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150212012409/http://bahamasfa.com/ |date=12 February 2015 }}
* [http://www.national-football-teams.com/v2/country.php?id=15 Bahamas on National Football Teams]
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070621102029/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=bah/index.html Bahamas on FIFA.com]

{{Bahamas national football team}}
{{Football in Bahamas}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the Bahamas}}

[[Category:Bahamas national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
[[Category:Bahamas national football teams| ]]
[[Category:1965 establishments in the Bahamas]]
